title: Custom Birthday Tee
excerpt: Anytime we get an email from Stephanie Howell for a custom birthday shirt, we get excited. And then we wonder where the time goes. She always has an awesome vision, and I am grateful she trusts us to help execute…
body:
Anytime we get an email from Stephanie Howell for a custom birthday shirt, we get excited. And then we wonder where the time goes. She always has an awesome vision, and I am grateful she trusts us to help execute her ideas. Since we've had this anchor design for over 6 years now, it seemed like the easiest and most on trend thing to do for Harper's mermaid party.

All of the photos from the party make it look so fun and the decorations were all so detailed and lovely. Big thanks to Stephanie for always thinking of us.
